response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrated professional C++ development experience on Windows and has no visible exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both of which are mandatory for this role. Their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, early-career mention of C++ in an academic or non-financial context.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical education
Proven ability to work in agile, CI/CD-driven environments
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Absence of any capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
